name: agent_loop_convergence_real_llm
host_notes: Windows / op run + uv run. Moonshot via .ai (international) endpoint, OpenAI embeddings via default endpoint.

interpretation.useful_delta_zero: round_useful_fraction held steady at 0.375 (3 of 8 pack items are ground-truth) for both first-quarter and last-quarter windows. Pack budget is constant at max_items=8, and the retrieval surface reliably surfaces the 3 required entities every round, so the ratio doesn't move.
interpretation.weighted_delta_negative: Expected. Per the synthetic baseline scenario's docstring: the domain_context profile weights breadth at 0.30, so noise-tagging-driven trimming of non-referenced items correctly produces a negative weighted_delta even while useful_delta is flat or positive. The 183 noise tags across 10 batches drove this trim.
interpretation.round_success_rate_1_0: Coverage threshold (0.6) hit every round in every domain. The LLM-generated summaries are rich enough that keyword + semantic retrieval together always surface the 3 required entities for the query's domain.
interpretation.advisories_zero_suppressed: Expected on this corpus. The post-row-3 fix in the synthetic baseline levels per-domain success rates to 1.0, which prevents anti-pattern advisories from forming organically. Non-zero suppression requires regime-shift mode (kwarg).

decision_recorded: Phase A real-LLM + real-embedder wiring validated end-to-end against the synthetic corpus on Moonshot/Kimi (chat) + OpenAI (embeddings). Cost per run is dominated by setup-time summary generation (~$0.006) regardless of round count. Latency p50 chat 7.7s reflects the .ai (international) endpoint; embedding p50 676ms is the default OpenAI endpoint. Phase A acceptance criteria (per plan-real-corpus-eval.md §8): live-LLM run committed to eval/runs/ ✓; cost report under $25 ✓ ($0.006); per-strategy retrieval contribution — NOT yet measured (deferred to follow-up; see PackBuilder telemetry note in scenario README).
